description: Login-aware Zhihu adapter for hot, search, and question entry points.

commands.name: hot
commands.description: Open the Zhihu hot page and detect whether content is available or login is required.

commands.name: search
commands.description: Open Zhihu search for a keyword and detect whether results are available or login is required.

commands.name: question
commands.description: Open a Zhihu question page and summarize the visible state or anti-bot response.
